acquisition method: Most data-dependent analysis (DDA) strategies will record only higher charged ions...
cleavage agent: trypsin is the most commonly used protease.
enrichment method: the recently published PhoX linker takes advantage of being enrichable via immobilized metal affinity chromatography (IMAC).
fractionation method: the combination of affinity-based enrichment with SCX was already successfully applied for in vivo studies.
fragmentation method: their cleavage is usually induced upon CID/HCD or, more rarely, via ETD fragmentation.
instrument: the digested protein was analyzed on an Orbitrap using a stepped collisional HCD method.
labeling: for studies, for example, investigating conformational changes of protein complexes... perform a label-free quantification.
